series_metadata.series_title: Manuals and Annual Local Government Services (LGS) reviews
series_metadata.series_description: Annual (or per update schedule) LGS assigned reviews with comments (either data or paper) of the following manuals: Township and Village Officer handbooks, Sheriff, Uniform School Accounting System User, Ohio County Treasurer, Guidelines for Developing Policies for Student Activity Programs, County Board of Developmental Disabilities manuals and Ohio Association of County Behavioral Health Handbook. Manuals provided to financial officials and administrations as a governmental accounting/operation resource.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain while needed then destroy after an electronic version has been created and verified for accuracy ; Electronic: Permanent, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
